content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 positions open on Day 4 — essentially at the max deployable limit with only INR 14,879 dry powder. VIX at 18.89 elevated, indicating binary-event style moves today. Multiple holdings sitting on solid gains (TORNTPOWER +2.5%, PNBHOUSING +1.2%, AUBANK +0.4%) that need stop-losses defined; MAHABANK drawdown -3.7% needs immediate SL anchoring. Priority this tick is installing SLs and trailing on winners, NOT new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52W high with Q4 beat (PAT +35% YoY, NII +19%), GNPA 1.45%. Broker TPs Rs 88-90. Entry at 81.50 is underwater -3.7% today but thesis intact. Set SL at 74.50 (below recent swing low 72.31 zone, -8.6% from entry, gives room). Target 88 aligns with HDFC Sec TP. Risk-reward from CMP 78.58: risk 4.08 vs reward 9.42 = 1:2.3."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat PAT +19% YoY, retail disbursement all-time high, GNPA 0.93%, MOSL upgrade. +9% today, position +1.2%. Trail SL to 945 (just below today's low 981 minus buffer to ~4.4% below entry). Target 1080 below 52W high 1141. Risk-reward: risk 43.75 vs reward 91.25 = 1:2.1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, thesis intact (weak INR, CB buying, geopolitical). SL at 119 (~4.9% below entry, below SMA50 band). Target 135 gives ~8% upside aligned with Goldman target trajectory. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+2.5% in position, stock broke to 52W high on Nabha Power acquisition approval. Trail SL to 1605 (near entry, locks small loss protection at -2.7%, above recent swing). Target 1780 (~5.3% upside). Power sector leader. Risk-reward from CMP 1689.70: 84.70 vs 90.30 = ~1:1.1 — acceptable on a winner where we're trailing, not initiating."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "new_target": 1560.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4: PAT +27% YoY, EBITDA margin 26.3%, volume-led growth. ICICI/Axis TPs Rs 1,640-1,650. Stock hit 52W high Rs 1425. Entered near recent peak — SL at 1345 (-4.8%), target 1560 gives 1:2 R/R. Defensive FMCG rotation play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 provisional (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%); results Apr 27 — binary event in 4 days. SL 1005 (-4.2% below entry), target 1135 (+8.2%). Must review post-results. Risk-reward 1:2."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 648.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "52W high on strong momentum. Q4 results Apr 29 — binary catalyst 6 days out. ICICI TP Rs 770. SL at 648 (below S1 648.20, -4.8% from entry), target 760. Risk-reward 1:2.4. Pharma outperformer."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2265.00,
      "new_target": 2510.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation, Q4 results Apr 30. +6.16% today. SL 2265 (-4.5%), target 2510 (+5.8%). Risk-reward 1:1.3 — tight but acceptable on defensive exposure with binary event ahead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Record FY26 capacity addition; Q4 results May 15. Analyst TPs 400-460. SL 385 (-4.8%), target 435 (+7.5%). Risk-reward 1:1.6. Defensive power utility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 203.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Power sector momentum, near 52W high, bullish RSI. SL 203 (-5.1%), target 235 (+9.8%). Risk-reward 1:1.9. Note: power cluster concentration with TORNTPOWER + NTPC — monitor combined exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-Q4 beat; give SL room at 74.50 below recent consolidation; do not exit on first-day drawdown."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Winner on Q4 beat + MOSL upgrade. Trail SL to 945 below today's low to protect gains while letting it run toward 1080."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL at 119 just below SMA50 support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "reasoning": "Break to 52W high on Nabha approval. Trail SL to 1605 to lock downside near entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 just reported; stock near peak but brokers targeting 1640+. SL below 20DMA."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Results Apr 27 — keep SL tight at 1005 given binary event risk. Re-evaluate post-results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 648.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 29 binary. SL below S1 648."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2265.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position ahead of Apr 30 Q4. SL at 2265."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Power utility defensive. SL 385 below 20DMA."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 203.00,
      "reasoning": "Power momentum intact. Monitor cluster with TORNTPOWER/NTPC."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA (buyback catalyst Apr 23-29), DRREDDY, CIPLA — pharma strength continues but already have GRANULES exposure. TIINDIA +8% on ascending-triangle breakout but PE 71 and Q3 PAT -14% — wait for Q4. ELECON +16% — chase-the-move risk, skip. IEX — BEARISH due to CERC market coupling overhang, skip despite volume surge. TRITURBINE — unusual volume without price move, investigate further but not actionable today. BHEL — ASM/GSM surveillance list, skip per rules.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed (at max deployable per 80% rule). Remaining INR 14,879 dry powder = effectively no room for new entries without trimming. Cluster exposure concern: POWER theme = TORNTPOWER (INR 60K) + NTPC (INR 50K) + ADANIPOWER (INR 49K) = ~INR 159K = 16% of capital — under the 20% cluster soft limit but monitor. FMCG = NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR = ~INR 167K = 17%. BANKING/FINANCIALS = MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK = ~INR 343K = 34% — at sector cap limit, NO MORE FINANCIALS. All positions now have defined SLs and targets. Three positions (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) have binary earnings events in the next week — will need active management. No new entries this tick; capital preservation and position management is the mandate."
}
